prompt: Design a game asset inspired by the reference image, featuring an isometric view of a magical workshop in a similar whimsical 3D render style, perfect for computer graphics.
prompt_refined: Generate a whimsical 3D render game asset of an isometric magical workshop, drawing visual inspiration from image 1. The scene should feature a charming building with a red tiled roof and a large wooden barrel integrated as an entrance, similar to image 1. Include a prominent copper pot still on the left side, emitting stylized smoke/steam, and a small wooden sign with a mug icon on the right, all presented on a vibrant green isometric platform with scattered rocks. The overall style should mirror the clean, soft, and inviting aesthetic of image 1, suitable for computer graphics.
objects: Charming building with a red tiled roof
Large wooden barrel integrated as an entrance
Prominent copper pot still on the left side
Stylized smoke/steam emitting from the pot still
Small wooden sign on the right side
Mug icon on the wooden sign
